description: Detects goroutine launches in Go that may leak: `go func(){}()` or `go namedFunc()`. Simplified from Rust: flags all go_statement nodes without checking for for-loop containment, select+ctx.Done() presence, or for-range channel patterns. Higher false positive rate than Rust implementation.

flag.message: goroutine launched -- verify it has a termination mechanism (select+ctx.Done() or channel drain) to avoid leaks
